opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: A hard, agonizing lump appeared near my back passage this morning after I strained on the toilet, and now I cannot sit down at all.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lump came on suddenly this morning after straining and the pain is so bad I can't sit — I want to know what it is and what to do tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: this morning, right after straining on the toilet during a bout of constipation and some heavy lifting
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and it has stayed just as bad
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, exquisite, throbbing pain from a hard lump right at the opening of my back passage
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonizing — the worst pain I've had down there, I can't bear to sit
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right at the edge of my back passage, on the outside
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it appeared this morning
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: standing or lying on my side helps a little; nothing really takes it away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting down is impossible, and any pressure on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've noticed streaks of bright red blood on the toilet paper on and off over the past year, and the area gets itchy; sometimes a bit of tissue comes down when I go and I have to push it back
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had itchiness and a bit of bleeding before but never a hard painful lump like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I cannot sit at all — I've been standing or lying on my side; it's stopping me doing anything

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing on-and-off bright red bleeding on the toilet paper and itchiness around the back passage
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: over the past year or so

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter hydrocortisone cream for the back passage

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: reports ongoing constipation and straining; recently did some heavy lifting

objective_data_offered.value: a hard, tense, dark bluish-purple lump about the size of a small grape right at the edge of the back passage; the skin around it does not look spread-out red or angry
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera of a hard-to-see area; cannot be palpated or examined remotely

objective_data_offered.value: no fever or shivering that I've noticed, and no pus or discharge coming from it
